libraries.description: Curated report-style slides from the primary template, including reusable generic report blocks.
libraries.design_notes: Primary template is useful for slide intent and placeholder geometry, but most curated slides are visually sparse. Prefer custom layout builders or heavy overlay curation.

libraries.description: Narrative sales slides with partner-program framing and strong service storytelling.
libraries.design_notes: Strong white/navy sales-system language with thin rules, light cards, icons, and clean footer rhythm.

libraries.description: Finance and AI sales slides with stronger proof, PoC, and ROI framing.
libraries.design_notes: Best reference for chart, proof, and data-storytelling pages. Navy plus orange accent gives clearer hierarchy than the primary template.

libraries.description: Portfolio and project showcase slides for PM and case-study storytelling.
libraries.design_notes: Best reference for screenshot-led project cases, result bullets, pill tags, and portfolio-style narrative pages.

slides.design_notes: Clean, high-contrast cover with strong blue field and centered title. Good model for branded opening slides.
Good reference for compact service cards and icon-led grouping.
